EditorFrameOptions

memberDescriptions.placeholder: - Placeholder text shown when the whole editor is empty.
memberDescriptions.placeholder_line: - per-line placeholder shown on the focused line when that line is empty. Takes priority over `placeholder` while a line is focused.
memberDescriptions.editableFrameAttributes: - Attributes for the editable frame[.sun-editor-editable]. ```js { editableFrameAttributes: { spellcheck: 'true', autocomplete: 'on' } } ``` /// === Layout & Sizing ===
memberDescriptions.innerWidth:
- Optional max-width for the editor body (`.se-wrapper`).
- **CSS length** (`"740px"`, `"60ch"`): editor body's content is clamped to this width and centered horizontally; scroll container stays full width (scrollbar at the outer edge, wheel/touch active over the whole area).
- **`"auto"`** or **empty string** (default): no constraint вЂ” natural full-width layout with default content padding.
- In `blockHandle` mode, the gutter handle tracks the centered text band. ```js { innerWidth: '740px' } ```
memberDescriptions.editorStyle: - Style string of the top frame of the editor. ```js { editorStyle: 'border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;' } ``` /// === Iframe Mode ===
memberDescriptions.iframe: - Content will be placed in an iframe and isolated from the rest of the page.
memberDescriptions.iframe_fullPage: - Allows the usage of HTML, HEAD, BODY tags and DOCTYPE declaration on the `iframe`.
memberDescriptions.iframe_cssFileName:
- CSS files to apply inside the iframe.
- String: Filename pattern to search in document `<link>` tags.
- `"*"`: Wildcard to include ALL stylesheets from the page.
- Absolute URLs and data URLs (`data:text/css,`) are also supported. ```js { iframe_cssFileName: ['suneditor', 'custom', 'https://example.com/style.css'] } ``` /// === Statusbar & Character Counter ===
memberDescriptions.statusbar_showPathLabel: - Displays the current node structure in the status bar.
memberDescriptions.statusbar_resizeEnable: - Enables resize function of the bottom status bar.
memberDescriptions.charCounter:
- Shows the number of characters in the editor.
- If the `maxCharCount` option has a value, it becomes `true`.
memberDescriptions.charCounter_max: - The maximum number of characters allowed to be inserted into the editor.
memberDescriptions.charCounter_label: - Text to be displayed in the `charCounter` area of the bottom bar. ```js { charCounter_label: 'Characters :' } ```
memberDescriptions.charCounter_type:
- Defines the calculation method of the `charCounter` option.
- `char`: Characters length.
- `byte`: Binary data size of characters.
- `byte-html`: Binary data size of the full HTML string. === Word Counter ===
memberDescriptions.wordCounter: - Shows the number of words in the editor.
memberDescriptions.wordCounter_label: - Text to be displayed in the `wordCounter` area of the bottom bar. ```js { wordCounter_label: 'Words :' } ```

memberDescriptions.__textStyleTags:
- The basic tags that serves as the base for `textStyleTags`
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.TEXT_STYLE_TAGS}
memberDescriptions.__tagStyles:
- The basic tags that serves as the base for `tagStyles`
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.TAG_STYLES}
memberDescriptions.__defaultElementWhitelist:
- A custom string used to construct a list of HTML elements to allow.
- The final list (regex pattern) is dynamically generated according to the following rules:
- A list of required elements, {@link DEFAULTS.REQUIRED_ELEMENT_WHITELIST}, is always included.
- If this option (`__defaultElementWhitelist`) is provided as a string: That value is used.
- If not provided or not a string: The default {@link DEFAULTS.ELEMENT_WHITELIST} is used.
- 1. If no options are given, the final pattern is:
- 'a|img|p|div|...' (REQUIRED + DEFAULT)
- 2. If options are given directly, the final pattern is:
- 'a|img|custom|tags' (REQUIRED + options.__defaultElementWhitelist)
memberDescriptions.__defaultAttributeWhitelist:
- A complete list of attributes that are allowed by default on all tags. Delimiter: `"|"`.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.ATTRIBUTE_WHITELIST}```js { __defaultAttributeWhitelist: 'href|target|src|alt|class' } ``` /// === Formatting  ===
memberDescriptions.__defaultFormatLine:
- Specifies the tag to be used as the editor's default `line` element.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.FORMAT_LINE}
memberDescriptions.__defaultFormatBrLine:
- Specifies the tag to be used as the editor's default `brLine` element.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.FORMAT_BR_LINE}
memberDescriptions.__defaultFormatClosureBrLine:
- Specifies the tag to be used as the editor's default `closureBrLine` element.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.FORMAT_CLOSURE_BR_LINE}
memberDescriptions.__defaultFormatBlock:
- Specifies the tag to be used as the editor's default `block` element.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.FORMAT_BLOCK}
memberDescriptions.__defaultFormatClosureBlock:
- Specifies the tag to be used as the editor's default `closureBlock` element.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.FORMAT_CLOSURE_BLOCK}/// === Filters & Behavior ===
memberDescriptions.__listCommonStyle:
- Defines the styles applied directly to `<li>` when a text style is set on the entire list item.
- For example, when changing the font size or color of a list item (`<li>`),
- these styles apply to the `<li>` tag instead of wrapping content in additional tags.
memberDescriptions.__pluginRetainFilter:
- Plugin retain filter configuration. (Internal use primarily)
- You can turn it off/on globally with `true`/`false` or set it per plugin. ```js // disable filter for table plugin only { __pluginRetainFilter: { table: false } } ```

items.name: EditorBaseOptions

memberDescriptions.plugins: - Plugin configuration. Pass an array of plugin classes or an object keyed by plugin name. ```js import plugins, { image, link, table } from 'suneditor/src/plugins'; { plugins: plugins, plugins: [image, link, table], plugins: { image, link, table } } ```
memberDescriptions.excludedPlugins: - List of plugin names to exclude. ```js { excludedPlugins: ['image', 'video'] } ```
memberDescriptions.buttonList:
- List of toolbar buttons, grouped by sub-arrays.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.BUTTON_LIST}/// === Modes & Themes ===
memberDescriptions.v2Migration: - Enables migration mode for SunEditor v2.
memberDescriptions.mode: - Toolbar mode: `classic`, `inline`, `balloon`, `balloon-always`. Append `:bottom` to place toolbar at the bottom (e.g. `classic:bottom`, `inline:bottom`).
memberDescriptions.blockHandle: - Block handle configuration. When provided, a per-line block handle UI is shown. Works independently of `mode`.
memberDescriptions.type: - Editor type. Use `"document"` for a document-style layout, with optional sub-types after `:`. ```js // type 'document:header,page' ```
memberDescriptions.reverseButtons:
- An array of command pairs whose shortcut icons should be opposite each other.
- Depends on the `textDirection` mode. /// === Strict & Advanced Filtering ===
memberDescriptions.strictMode:
- Enables strict filtering of tags, attributes, and styles.
- Use `true` to enable all filters (default), or an object to control individual filters.
- Setting `false` is not supported; use the object form to disable specific filters instead.
- :filter description
- `tagFilter`: Filters disallowed HTML tags (`elementWhitelist`/`elementBlacklist`)
- `formatFilter`: Filters format elements (`formatLine`/`formatBlock`)
- `classFilter`: Filters disallowed CSS class names (`allowedClassName`)
- `textStyleTagFilter`: Filters text style tags (b, i, u, span, etc.)
- `attrFilter`: Filters disallowed HTML attributes (`attributeWhitelist`/`attributeBlacklist`)
- `styleFilter`: Filters disallowed inline styles (per-tag from `tagStyles`) ```js // disable only attribute and style filters { strictMode: { tagFilter: true, formatFilter: true, classFilter: true, textStyleTagFilter: true, attrFilter: false, styleFilter: false } } ```
memberDescriptions.scopeSelectionTags:
- Tags treated as whole units when selecting all content.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SCOPE_SELECTION_TAGS}/// === Content Filtering & Formatting === == #### 1) Tag & Element Control
memberDescriptions.elementWhitelist:
- Specifies HTML elements to additionally allow beyond the default allow list. Delimiter: `"|"`.
- Added to the default list determined by {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultElementWhitelist}. ```js { elementWhitelist: 'mark|details|summary' } ```
memberDescriptions.elementBlacklist:
- Specifies HTML elements that should not be used. Delimiter: `"|"`.
- Tags specified here will eventually be removed, even if they are included in other whitelists. ```js { elementBlacklist: 'script|style|iframe' } ```
memberDescriptions.allowedEmptyTags:
- A list of tags that are allowed to be kept even if their values are empty.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST}- Concatenated with `ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST` to form the final `allowedEmptyTags` list.
memberDescriptions.allowedClassName:
- Allowed class names.
- Added the default value {@link DEFAULTS.CLASS_NAME}/// #### 2) Attribute Control
memberDescriptions.attributeWhitelist:
- Specifies additional attributes to allow for each tag. `"*"` applies to all tags.
- Rules specified here will be merged into {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultAttributeWhitelist}. ```js { attributeWhitelist: { a: 'href|target', img: 'src|alt', '*': 'id|data-[^\s]+' } } ```
memberDescriptions.attributeBlacklist:
- Specifies attributes to disallow by tag. `"*"` applies to all tags.
- Attributes specified here will eventually be removed even if they are allowed by other settings.
- A list of required elements, {@link DEFAULTS.REQUIRED_FORMAT_LINE}, is always included. ```js { attributeBlacklist: { '*': 'onclick|onerror' } } ``` /// #### 3) Text & Inline Style Control
memberDescriptions.textStyleTags:
- Additional text style tags.
- The default follows {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__textStyleTags}
memberDescriptions.convertTextTags: - Maps text styles to specific HTML tags. ```js { convertTextTags: { bold: 'b', italic: 'i', underline: 'u', strike: 's' } } ```
memberDescriptions.allUsedStyles: - Specifies additional styles to the list of allowed styles. Delimiter: `"|"`. ```js { allUsedStyles: 'color|background-color|text-shadow' } ```
memberDescriptions.tagStyles:
- Specifies allowed CSS styles per HTML tag.
- Key is a tag name, multiple tags joined with `|`, or a category sentinel (`@text`, `@line`).
- Value is a pipe-delimited list of allowed style names.
- Resolution order when filtering an element: explicit tag entry в†’ `@line` (for formatLine elements) в†’ `@text` (for textStyleTags).
- An explicit tag entry **replaces** the category default вЂ” include category styles in the value if you want both.
- Merged with {@link DEFAULTS.TAG_STYLES}; user-supplied keys win. ```js { tagStyles: { '@text': 'color|font-size|background-color',  // default for span, b, i, em, ... '@line': 'text-align|margin|line-height',     // default for p, h1-h6, div, li, ... 'table|td': 'border|color|background-color',  // per-tag whitelist div: 'color',                                   // explicit override; ignores `@line` default hr: 'border-top', } } ```
memberDescriptions.fontSizeUnits:
- Allowed font size units.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.SIZE_UNITS}
memberDescriptions.retainStyleMode:
- Determines how inline elements (e.g. `<span>`, `<strong>`) are handled when deleting text.
- `repeat`: Styles are retained unless backspace is repeatedly pressed.
- Continuous pressing will eventually remove the styles.
- `none`: Styles are not retained. Inline elements are immediately removed with the text.
- `always`: Styles persist indefinitely unless explicitly removed.
- Even if all text inside an inline element is deleted, the element itself remains. /// #### 4) Line & Block Formatting
memberDescriptions.defaultLine: - Default `line` element when inserting new lines.
memberDescriptions.defaultLineBreakFormat:
- Specifies the default line break format. - [Recommended] `line` : Line break is divided into general tags. - [Not recommended] `br` : Line breaks are treated as
on the same line. (like shift+enter) - Line breaks are handled as
within `line`. - You can create a new `line` by entering a line break twice in a row. - Formats that include `line`, such as "Quote", still operate on a `line` basis. - suneditor processes work in `line` units. - When set to `br`, performance may decrease when editing a lot of data.
memberDescriptions.lineAttrReset: - Line properties that should be reset when changing lines. Delimiter: `"|"`. ```js { lineAttrReset: 'id|name' } ```
memberDescriptions.formatLine:
- Additionally allowed `line` elements beyond the default. Delimiter: `"|"`.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatLine} to form the final `line` list.
- `line` element also contains `brLine` element. ```js { formatLine: 'ARTICLE|SECTION' } ```
memberDescriptions.formatBrLine:
- Additionally allowed `brLine` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatBrLine} to form the final `brLine` list.
- `brLine` elements are included in the `line` element.
- `brLine` elements' line break is `BR` tag. ```js { formatBrLine: 'CODE' } ```
- вЂ» Entering the Enter key on the last line ends `brLine` and appends `line`.
memberDescriptions.formatClosureBrLine:
- Additionally allowed `closureBrLine` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatClosureBrLine} for the final `closureBrLine` list.
- `closureBrLine` elements are included in the `brLine`.
- `closureBrLine` elements' line break is `BR` tag.
- вЂ» You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key.
- вЂ» Use it only in special cases. ([ex] format of table cells)
memberDescriptions.formatBlock:
- Additionally allowed `block` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatBlock} to form the final `block` list.
- `block` wraps the `line` and `component`.
memberDescriptions.formatClosureBlock:
- Additionally allowed `closureBlock` elements beyond the default.
- Concatenated with {@link PrivateBaseOptions.__defaultFormatClosureBlock} for the final `closureBlock` list.
- `closureBlock` elements are included in the `block`.
- `closureBlock` element wraps the `line` and `component`.
- вЂ» You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key.
- вЂ» Use it only in special cases. (e.g. format of table cells) /// === UI & Interaction ===
memberDescriptions.toolbar_innerWidth:
- Center the toolbar's button row (`.se-btn-tray`) horizontally.
- **CSS length** (e.g. `"500px"`, `"740px"`, `"60ch"`): toolbar background spans full width while the button row is capped at that width and centered. If buttons fit, the row stays on a single line; if they exceed the cap, they wrap inside it.
- **`"auto"`**: no cap вЂ” the row is sized to its content and simply centered.
- **Empty string** (default): no constraint.
- **Note on `responsiveButtonList`**: thresholds compare against the toolbar's full width, not the band. When this option is set, calibrate `responsiveButtonList` keys around the toolbar size you actually want each button set to kick in at. ```js { toolbar_innerWidth: '740px' } { toolbar_innerWidth: 'auto' } ```
memberDescriptions.toolbar_sticky:
- Enables sticky toolbar.
- `number`: Sets the sticky top position (px). Use `-1` to disable sticky.
- `{top, offset}`: `top` is the sticky position when the page header is visible.
- `offset` is the sticky position when a virtual keyboard shifts the viewport (e.g., on tablets, touch devices).
- When the virtual keyboard is active, `offset` replaces `top` so the toolbar doesn't leave a gap
- for a page header that has scrolled out of view. Default `offset` is `0`. ```js // Basic usage вЂ” sticky at top with 0px offset toolbar_sticky: 0 // Account for a 92px fixed/sticky site header toolbar_sticky: 92 // 92px header on desktop, but 0px when virtual keyboard pushes the viewport toolbar_sticky: { top: 92, offset: 0 } ```
memberDescriptions.subToolbar: - Sub-toolbar configuration. A secondary toolbar that appears on text selection.
memberDescriptions.statusbar_container: - Container element for the status bar.
memberDescriptions.shortcuts:
- Custom keyboard shortcuts.
- Keys starting with `_` are user-defined custom shortcuts. Each value is an array of `[keyCombo, hintLabel]` pairs.
- Key combos use `c` (Ctrl/Cmd), `s` (Shift), and `KeyEvent.code` values joined by `+`.
- Use `$~pluginName.method` to call a specific plugin method. ```js { shortcuts: { bold: ['c+KeyB', 'B'], _h1: ['c+s+Digit1+$~blockStyle.applyHeaderByShortcut', ''] } } ``` /// === Advanced Features ===
memberDescriptions.copyFormatKeepOn: - Keeps the format of the copied content.
memberDescriptions.autoLinkify:
- Automatically converts URLs into hyperlinks. (`Link` plugin required)
- Default: `Boolean(plugins.link)` вЂ” determined by whether the `link` plugin is enabled.
memberDescriptions.autoStyleify: - Styles applied automatically on text input.
memberDescriptions.historyStackDelayTime: - Delay time for history stack updates (ms).
memberDescriptions.historyStackSize: - Maximum number of history entries per root frame. Oldest entries are discarded when exceeded.
memberDescriptions.fullScreenOffset: - Offset applied when entering fullscreen mode.
memberDescriptions.previewTemplate: - Custom HTML template for preview mode. Use `{{ contents }}` as a placeholder for editor content.
memberDescriptions.printTemplate:
- Custom HTML template for print mode. Use `{{ contents }}` as a placeholder for editor content. ```js { previewTemplate: '

Preview

{{ contents }}
' } ```
memberDescriptions.componentInsertBehavior:
- Enables automatic selection of inserted components.
- For inline components: places cursor near the component, or selects if no nearby range.
- For block components: executes behavior based on `selectMode`:
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.
memberDescriptions.finder_panel:
- Shows the built-in Find/Replace panel UI.
- The finder is always created internally; this option controls whether the panel is visible to users (Ctrl+F / Ctrl+H).
memberDescriptions.finder_liveSearch: - Searches instantly as you type (debounced). When false, search runs only on Enter. /// === Dynamic Options ===
memberDescriptions.externalLibs:
- External libraries like CodeMirror, KaTeX, or MathJax.
- See {@link https://github.com/ARA-developer/suneditor/blob/develop/guide/external-libraries.md External Libraries Guide}```js { externalLibs: { katex: window.katex, codeMirror: { src: CodeMirror } } } ```
memberDescriptions.allowedExtraTags:
- Specifies extra allowed or disallowed tags. `true` to allow, `false` to disallow.
- The default follows {@link DEFAULTS.EXTRA_TAG_MAP}```js { allowedExtraTags: { script: false, style: false, mark: true } } ``` /// === User Events ===
memberDescriptions.events: - User event handlers configuration. ```js { events: { onChange: (content) => console.log(content), onImageUploadBefore: (files, info) => true } } ``` /// === [ Plugin-Specific Options ] === ---[ Auto-generated by scripts/check/inject-plugin-jsdoc.cjs - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY ]---

{
	/**
	 * - Format list.
	 * Use string shortcuts for built-in tags, or `BlockStyleItem` objects for custom block styles.
	 * - `command` вЂ” `"line"`: single line block, `"br-line"`: br-separated block, `"block"`: container block.

	 * ['p', 'h1', 'h2', 'blockquote', { tag: 'div', command: 'block', name: 'Custom Block', class: 'my-block' }]
	 * ```
	 */
	items?: Array<
		'p' | 'div' | 'blockquote' | 'pre' | 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6' | string | BlockStyleItem
	>;
}

memberDescriptions.items:
- Format list. Use string shortcuts for built-in tags, or `BlockStyleItem` objects for custom block styles.
- `command` вЂ” `"line"`: single line block, `"br-line"`: br-separated block, `"block"`: container block. ```js // string shortcuts + custom item ['p', 'h1', 'h2', 'blockquote', { tag: 'div', command: 'block', name: 'Custom Block', class: 'my-block' }] ```

items.name: FontColorPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.items: - Color list. Use HEX strings or objects with `value`/`name` for labeled colors.
memberDescriptions.disableHEXInput: - Disable HEX input ```js { items: ['#ff0000', '#00ff00', { value: '#0000ff', name: 'Blue' }], splitNum: 6 } ```

items.name: HRPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.items: - HR list ```js [ { name: 'Solid', class: '__se__solid', style: 'border-top: 1px solid #000;' }, { name: 'Dashed', class: '__se__dashed' } ] ```

items.name: LayoutPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.items:
- Layout list. Each item defines a named layout template with raw HTML. ```js [{ name: 'Two Columns', html: '
Left
Right
' }] ```

items.name: LineHeightPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.items: - Line height list ```js [{ text: 'Single', value: '1' }, { text: '1.5', value: '1.5' }, { text: 'Double', value: '2' }] ```

items.name: ParagraphStylePluginOptions

memberDescriptions.items: - Paragraph item list ```js // use default paragraph styles ['spaced', 'bordered', 'neon'] // custom paragraph styles [ { name: 'spaced', class: '__se__p-spaced', _class: '' }, { name: 'bordered', class: '__se__p-bordered', _class: '' }, { name: 'neon', class: '__se__p-neon', _class: '' } ] ```

items.name: TablePluginOptions

memberDescriptions.colorList: - HEX color list for the cell background color picker. ```js { colorList: ['#bbf7d0', '#fde68a', '#fecaca', '#e9d5ff'] } ```

items.name: TemplatePluginOptions

memberDescriptions.items:
- Template list ```js [{ name: 'Greeting', html: '

Hello! Thank you for contacting us.

' }] ```

items.name: TextStylePluginOptions

memberDescriptions.items: - Text style item list. Use string shortcuts for built-in styles (e.g., `'shadow'`), or objects for custom styles. ```js ['shadow', { name: 'Highlight', class: 'my-highlight', tag: 'mark' }] ```

items.name: AutocompleteTriggerConfig

memberDescriptions.data: - Static data array. Each item must have a `key` field. Mutually exclusive with `apiUrl`. ```js // data [{ key: 'john', name: 'John Doe', url: '/users/john' }] ```
memberDescriptions.apiUrl: - API endpoint URL. Supports `{key}` and `{limitSize}` placeholders. Mutually exclusive with `data`.
memberDescriptions.apiHeaders: - HTTP headers for the API request.
memberDescriptions.transformResponse: - Transforms parsed JSON response into an array of data items.
memberDescriptions.renderItem: - Custom dropdown item renderer. Receives `(item, triggerText)`, returns HTML string.
memberDescriptions.onSelect:
- Custom selection handler. Returns:
- `string`: inserted as text node
- `Element`: inserted as-is
- `{tag, attrs, text}`: creates element via `dom.utils.createElement`

items.name: AutocompletePluginOptions

memberDescriptions.delayTime: - Debounce delay in ms before processing input.
memberDescriptions.limitSize: - Maximum number of items to display in the dropdown.
memberDescriptions.searchStartLength: - Minimum input length before triggering search.
memberDescriptions.useCachingData: - Whether to cache query responses per trigger.
memberDescriptions.useCachingFieldData: - Whether to cache selected items for priority display.
memberDescriptions.triggers:
- Per-trigger configurations keyed by trigger character. ```js // Basic usage with static data вЂ” mention trigger const editor = SUNEDITOR.create('#editor', { plugins: [autocomplete], autocomplete: { triggers: { '@': { data: [ { key: 'john', name: 'John Doe' }, { key: 'jane', name: 'Jane Smith' }, ], }, }, }, }); // API-based trigger with custom rendering and selection const editor = SUNEDITOR.create('#editor', { plugins: [autocomplete], autocomplete: { delayTime: 200, limitSize: 10, triggers: { '@': { apiUrl: '/api/users?q={key}&limit={limitSize}', apiHeaders: { Authorization: 'Bearer TOKEN' }, transformResponse: (json) => json.data.map((u) => ({ key: u.username, name: u.displayName, id: u.id })), renderItem: (item) => `
${item.key} ${item.name}
`, onSelect: (item, trigger) => ({ tag: 'a', attrs: { href: `/users/${item.id}`, 'data-se-autocomplete': trigger + item.key }, text: trigger + item.key, }), }, '#': { apiUrl: '/api/tags?q={key}', transformResponse: (json) => json.tags, searchStartLength: 2, useCachingData: false, }, }, }, }); ```

items.name: SlashCommandItem

memberDescriptions.title: - Display label.
memberDescriptions.icon: - Icon key from `$.icons` (e.g. `'h1'`) or a raw HTML string (e.g. `'<svg>...</svg>'`).
memberDescriptions.keywords: - Extra search terms used in addition to the title.
memberDescriptions.action: - Invoked when the item is selected. The trigger string (e.g. `/hea`) is already removed from the editor and the caret restored to that position before `action` runs. The action owns its history entry вЂ” calling an L3 wrapper (`$.html.*`, `$.format.*`, `$.inline.apply`) auto-pushes; otherwise call `$.history.push(false)` manually.

items.name: SlashCommandActionContext

memberDescriptions.query: - The text the user typed after the trigger (e.g. `'hea'`).

items.name: SlashCommandPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.triggerChar: - Character that opens the command menu. Single character recommended.
memberDescriptions.items: - Menu entries. Strings resolve via `ResolveButton` (plugin names, built-in commands like `'bold'`); objects are custom items with their own `action`. Required.
memberDescriptions.delayTime: - Debounce delay (ms) before the input is inspected for the trigger.
memberDescriptions.limitSize: - Maximum number of items shown in the dropdown.
memberDescriptions.emptyMessage: - Message shown when no items match the query. If unset, the menu closes on no match.
memberDescriptions.renderItem: - Custom item HTML renderer. Applied only to custom item objects; plugin-name entries always render with the canonical BlockHandle row. ```js SUNEDITOR.create('#editor', { plugins: [slashCommand], slashCommand: { triggerChar: '/', items: [ { key: 'h1', title: 'Heading 1', icon: 'h1', keywords: ['header', 'title'], action: ($) => $.format.applyBlock(document.createElement('H1')), }, 'bold', 'image', 'blockStyle', ], }, }); ```

items.name: FontSizePluginOptions

memberDescriptions.sizeUnit:
- The unit for the font size.
- Accepted values include: `'px'`, `'pt'`, `'em'`, `'rem'`, `'vw'`, `'vh'`, `'%'` or `'text'`.
- If `'text'` is used, a text-based font size list is applied.
memberDescriptions.showDefaultSizeLabel: - Determines whether the default size label is displayed in the dropdown menu.
memberDescriptions.showIncDecControls:
- When `true`, displays increase and decrease buttons for font size adjustments.
- Defaults to `false`. Always `false` when `sizeUnit` is `'text'` (ignored).
memberDescriptions.disableInput:
- When `true`, disables the direct font size input box.
- Defaults to `true` when `sizeUnit` is `'text'`, otherwise `false`.
memberDescriptions.unitMap: - Override or extend the default unit mapping for font sizes. Each key is a unit name (e.g., `'px'`, `'em'`). `default`: initial size, `inc`: step for inc/dec buttons, `min`/`max`: range limits, `list`: dropdown values. When `sizeUnit` is `'text'`, list items use `{title: string, size: string}` instead of numbers. ```js { unitMap: { px: { default: 16, inc: 1, min: 8, max: 72, list: [8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 48] } } } ```

items.name: AudioPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.defaultWidth: - The default width of the `AUDIO` tag.
memberDescriptions.defaultHeight: - The default height of the `AUDIO` tag.
memberDescriptions.createFileInput: - Whether to create a file input element.
memberDescriptions.createUrlInput:
- Whether to create a URL input element.
- Defaults to `true`. Always `true` when `createFileInput` is `false`.
memberDescriptions.uploadUrl:
- The URL to which files will be uploaded.
- The server must return: ```js { "result": [ { "url": "https://example.com/audio.mp3", "name": "audio.mp3", "size": 3145728 } ] } ```
memberDescriptions.uploadHeaders: - Headers to include in the file upload request.
memberDescriptions.uploadSizeLimit: - The total upload size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.uploadSingleSizeLimit: - The single file size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.allowMultiple: - Whether to allow multiple file uploads.
memberDescriptions.audioTagAttributes: - Additional attributes to set on the `AUDIO` tag. ```js { audioTagAttributes: { controls: 'true', preload: 'metadata' } } ```
memberDescriptions.insertBehavior:
- Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

items.name: DrawingPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.outputFormat: - The output format of the drawing. Options: `"dataurl"`, `"svg"`.
memberDescriptions.useFormatType: - Whether to enable format type selection (`block` vs `inline`).
memberDescriptions.defaultFormatType: - The default format type, either `"block"` or `"inline"`.
memberDescriptions.keepFormatType: - Whether to maintain the chosen format type after drawing.
memberDescriptions.lineWidth: - The width of the drawing line.
memberDescriptions.lineReconnect: - Whether to reconnect lines when drawing.
memberDescriptions.lineCap: - The style of the line cap (`"butt"`, `"round"`, or `"square"`).
memberDescriptions.lineColor: - The color of the drawing line.
memberDescriptions.canResize: - Whether the modal form can be resized.
memberDescriptions.maintainRatio: - Whether to maintain the aspect ratio when resizing.
memberDescriptions.formSize: - The size configuration for the drawing modal form.

items.name: EmbedPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.canResize: - Whether the embed element can be resized.
memberDescriptions.showHeightInput: - Whether to display the height input field.
memberDescriptions.defaultWidth: - The default width of the embed element (numeric value or with unit).
memberDescriptions.defaultHeight: - The default height of the embed element (numeric value or with unit).
memberDescriptions.percentageOnlySize: - Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.
memberDescriptions.uploadUrl:
- The URL for file uploads.
- The server must return: ```js { "result": [ { "url": "https://example.com/embed.html", "name": "embed.html", "size": 2048 } ] } ```
memberDescriptions.uploadHeaders: - Headers to include in file upload requests.
memberDescriptions.uploadSizeLimit: - The total file upload size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.uploadSingleSizeLimit: - The single file upload size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.iframeTagAttributes: - Additional attributes to set on the `IFRAME` tag. ```js { iframeTagAttributes: { allowfullscreen: 'true', loading: 'lazy' } } ```
memberDescriptions.query_youtube: - YouTube query parameter appended to the embed URL. ```js { query_youtube: 'autoplay=1&mute=1' } ```
memberDescriptions.query_vimeo: - Vimeo query parameter appended to the embed URL. ```js { query_vimeo: 'autoplay=1' } ```
memberDescriptions.urlPatterns: - Additional URL patterns to recognize as embeddable content.
memberDescriptions.scriptSrcWhitelist:
- Allowed `<script src=...>` patterns for raw embed HTML
- (e.g. Twitter blockquote + `widgets.js`). Each entry is a `RegExp` (tested against the full src) or a `string` (matched via `startsWith`).
- Defaults to `[]` вЂ” all script tags are rejected.** Inline scripts (no `src`) are always rejected. ```js { scriptSrcWhitelist: [ /^https:\/\/platform\.x\.com\/widgets\.js$/, /^https:\/\/www\.instagram\.com\/embed\.js$/, ] } ```
memberDescriptions.embedQuery: - Custom embed service definitions. Each key is a service name, with `pattern` to match the URL, `action` to transform it into an embed URL, and `tag` for the output element. ```js { embedQuery: { facebook: { pattern: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?facebook\.com\/(.+)/i, action: (url) => `https://www.facebook.com/plugins/post.php?href=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`, tag: 'iframe' } } } ```
memberDescriptions.insertBehavior:
- Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

items.name: ImagePluginOptions

memberDescriptions.canResize: - Whether the image element can be resized.
memberDescriptions.showHeightInput: - Whether to display the height input field.
memberDescriptions.defaultWidth: - The default width of the image. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.
memberDescriptions.defaultHeight: - The default height of the image. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.
memberDescriptions.percentageOnlySize: - Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.
memberDescriptions.createFileInput: - Whether to create a file input element for image uploads.
memberDescriptions.createUrlInput:
- Whether to create a URL input element for image insertion.
- Defaults to `true`. Always `true` when `createFileInput` is `false`.
memberDescriptions.uploadUrl:
- The URL endpoint for image file uploads.
- The server must return: ```js { "result": [ { "url": "https://example.com/image.jpg", "name": "image.jpg", "size": 123456 } ] } ```
memberDescriptions.uploadHeaders: - Additional headers to include in the file upload request. ```js { uploadUrl: '/api/upload/image', uploadHeaders: { Authorization: 'Bearer token' } } ```
memberDescriptions.uploadSizeLimit: - The total upload size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.uploadSingleSizeLimit: - The single file upload size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.allowMultiple: - Whether multiple image uploads are allowed.
memberDescriptions.acceptedFormats: - The accepted file formats for image uploads.
memberDescriptions.useFormatType: - Whether to enable format type selection (`block` or `inline`).
memberDescriptions.defaultFormatType: - The default image format type (`"block"` or `"inline"`).
memberDescriptions.keepFormatType: - Whether to retain the chosen format type after image insertion.
memberDescriptions.linkEnableFileUpload: - Whether to enable file uploads for linked images.
memberDescriptions.insertBehavior:
- Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- For inline components: places cursor near the component, or selects if no nearby range.
- For block components: executes behavior based on `selectMode`:
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

items.name: ImageState

memberDescriptions.onlyPercentage: - Whether only percentage sizing is allowed
memberDescriptions.produceIndex: - Image production index for batch operations

items.name: LinkOptions

memberDescriptions.uploadUrl:
- The URL endpoint for file uploads.
- The server must return: ```js { "result": [ { "url": "https://example.com/file.pdf", "name": "file.pdf", "size": 1048576 } ] } ```
memberDescriptions.uploadHeaders: - Additional headers for file upload requests.
memberDescriptions.uploadSizeLimit: - The total file upload size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.uploadSingleSizeLimit: - The single file upload size limit in bytes.
memberDescriptions.acceptedFormats: - Accepted file formats for link uploads.

items.name: MathPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.canResize: - Whether the math modal can be resized.
memberDescriptions.autoHeight: - Whether to automatically adjust the height of the modal.
memberDescriptions.fontSizeList: - A list of font size options for the math expression size selector. ```js // fontSizeList [{ text: '1', value: '1em', default: true }, { text: '1.5', value: '1.5em' }, { text: '2', value: '2em' }] ```
memberDescriptions.onPaste: - A callback function to handle paste events in the math input area.
memberDescriptions.formSize: - An object specifying the dimensions for the math modal.

items.name: VideoPluginOptions

memberDescriptions.canResize: - Whether the video element can be resized.
memberDescriptions.showHeightInput: - Whether to display the height input field.
memberDescriptions.defaultWidth: - The default width of the video element. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.
memberDescriptions.defaultHeight: - The default height of the video element. If a number is provided, `"px"` will be appended.
memberDescriptions.percentageOnlySize: - Whether to allow only percentage-based sizing.
memberDescriptions.createFileInput: - Whether to create a file input element for video uploads.
memberDescriptions.createUrlInput:
- Whether to create a URL input element for video embedding.
- Defaults to `true`. Always `true` when `createFileInput` is `false`.
memberDescriptions.uploadUrl:
- The URL endpoint for video file uploads.
- The server must return: ```js { "result": [ { "url": "https://example.com/video.mp4", "name": "video.mp4", "size": 5242880 } ] } ```
memberDescriptions.uploadHeaders: - Additional headers to include in the video upload request.
memberDescriptions.uploadSizeLimit: - The total upload size limit for videos in bytes.
memberDescriptions.uploadSingleSizeLimit: - The single file upload size limit for videos in bytes.
memberDescriptions.allowMultiple: - Whether multiple video uploads are allowed.
memberDescriptions.acceptedFormats: - Accepted file formats for video uploads (`"video/*"`).
memberDescriptions.defaultRatio: - The default aspect ratio for the video (height/width, e.g. 16:9 в†’ `9/16 = 0.5625`).
memberDescriptions.showRatioOption: - Whether to display the ratio option in the modal.
memberDescriptions.ratioOptions: - Custom ratio options for video resizing (value = height/width). ```js // ratioOptions [{ name: '16:9', value: 0.5625 }, { name: '4:3', value: 0.75 }] ```
memberDescriptions.videoTagAttributes: - Additional attributes to set on the `VIDEO` tag. ```js { videoTagAttributes: { controls: 'true', muted: 'true', playsinline: '' } } ```
memberDescriptions.iframeTagAttributes: - Additional attributes to set on the `IFRAME` tag. ```js { iframeTagAttributes: { allowfullscreen: 'true', loading: 'lazy' } } ```
memberDescriptions.query_youtube: - Additional query parameters for YouTube embedding. ```js { query_youtube: 'autoplay=1&mute=1' } ```
memberDescriptions.query_vimeo: - Additional query parameters for Vimeo embedding. ```js { query_vimeo: 'autoplay=1' } ```
memberDescriptions.urlPatterns: - Additional URL patterns for video embedding.
memberDescriptions.extensions: - Additional file extensions to be recognized for video uploads.
memberDescriptions.insertBehavior:
- Component insertion behavior for selection and cursor placement.
- [default: `options.get('componentInsertBehavior')`]
- `auto`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, otherwise select the component.
- `select`: Always select the inserted component.
- `line`: Move cursor to the next line if possible, or create a new line and move there.
- `none`: Do nothing.

items.name: VideoState
ModuleModal

memberDescriptions.modalAction:
This function is called when a form within a modal window is `submit`.
- `true`: modal and loading are closed
- `false`: only loading is closed
- `undefined`: only modal is closed
memberDescriptions.modalOn: Executes the method that is called when a plugin's modal is opened.
memberDescriptions.modalInit: This function is called before the modal window opens or closes.

items.name: ModuleController

memberDescriptions.controllerAction: Executes the method that is called when a button is clicked in the `controller`.
memberDescriptions.controllerOn: This function is called after the `controller` is opened.
memberDescriptions.controllerClose: This function is called before the `controller` is closed.

memberDescriptions.browserInit: Executes the method that is called when a `Browser` module is opened.

items.name: ModuleColorPicker

memberDescriptions.colorPickerAction:
Executes the method called when a button of `ColorPicker` module is clicked.
- When applying the `ColorPicker` module globally to the `dropdown` menu,
- the default `action` method is not called.
memberDescriptions.colorPickerHueSliderOpen: Executes the method called when the `HueSlider` module is opened.
memberDescriptions.colorPickerHueSliderClose: Executes the method called when the `HueSlider` module is closed.

memberDescriptions.hueSliderAction: This method is called when the color is selected in the hue slider.
memberDescriptions.hueSliderCancelAction: This method is called when the hue slider is closed.

items.name: EditorComponent

memberDescriptions.componentSelect: Executes the method that is called when a component of a plugin is selected.
memberDescriptions.componentDeselect: Called when a container is deselected.
memberDescriptions.componentEdit: Executes the method that is called when a component is being edited.
memberDescriptions.componentDestroy: Method to delete a component of a plugin, called by the `FileManager`, `Controller` module.
memberDescriptions.componentCopy: Executes the method that is called when a component copy is requested.

items.name: DEFAULTS
items.definition:
BUTTON_LIST: (string | string[])[]
SCOPE_SELECTION_TAGS: string[]
ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST: string
CLASS_NAME: string
REQUIRED_FORMAT_LINE: string
SPAN_STYLES: string
LINE_STYLES: string
SIZE_UNITS: string[]
EXTRA_TAG_MAP: Record<string, boolean>

memberDescriptions.ALLOWED_EMPTY_NODE_LIST: Default value: `'.se-component, pre, blockquote, hr, li, table, img, iframe, video, audio, canvas, details'`
memberDescriptions.EXTRA_TAG_MAP: Default value: `{ script: false, style: false, meta: false, link: false, '[a-z]+:[a-z]+': false }`
